title: "Refactoring Runaway": Understanding and Mitigating Tangled Refactorings in Coding Agents for Issue Resolution
authors: Zhao Tian, Zifan Zhang, Tao Xiao, Dong Wang, Masanari Kondo, Junjie Chen, Yasutaka Kamei
abstract: Recent advances in coding agents have shown remarkable progress in software issue resolution. In practice, real-world issues are typically bug fixes or feature requests in which human developers naturally incorporate refactoring as part of the resolution process, resulting in tangled refactoring. Since LLMs are trained on large-scale open-source repositories, coding agents may inherit such behaviors. In this paper, we conduct an empirical study on Multi-SWE-bench, analyzing 3,691 valid patches generated by three agent frameworks with 12 LLMs. We find that coding agents introduce tangled refactorings less frequently (21.43% vs. 36.72%) and with lower intensity (0.66 vs. 1.75) than human developers, although they exhibit a broader diversity of refactoring types. Logistic regression analysis further shows that tangled refactorings are strongly associated with reduced compilability, while exhibiting no significant association with functional correctness. Based on these findings, we propose a refactoring-aware refinement approach that assesses the necessity and safety of tangled refactorings and selectively removes or repairs problematic operations. Our approach improves compilability from 19.34% to 38.33%, and additionally resolves 2.79% previously unresolved issues. Overall, this work presents the first step towards understanding tangled refactoring practices in agentic issue resolution and opens up avenues for future work.
title_zh: 《“重构失控”：理解和缓解编码代理中纠缠重构的问题解决》
abstract_zh: 近年来，编码代理在软件问题解决方面取得了显著进展。在实际应用中，真实世界的问题通常是错误修复或功能请求，人类开发者自然会将重构作为解决过程的一部分，导致出现混杂重构。由于大型语言模型在大规模开源代码库上训练，编码代理可能继承此类行为。本文在Multi-SWE-bench上开展实证研究，分析了基于12种大型语言模型的三种代理框架生成的3,691个有效补丁。我们发现，与人类开发者相比，编码代理引入混杂重构的频率更低（21.43% vs. 36.72%），强度也较小（0.66 vs. 1.75），但其重构类型多样性更广。逻辑回归分析进一步表明，混杂重构与编译能力下降密切相关，但与功能正确性无显著关联。基于这些发现，我们提出了一种重构感知的优化方法，评估混杂重构的必要性和安全性，并选择性地移除或修复有问题的操作。该方法将编译能力从19.34%提升至38.33%，并额外解决了2.79%之前未解决的问题。总体而言，本工作为理解代理式问题解决中的混杂重构实践迈出了第一步，并为未来研究开辟了方向。

title: Vector Policy Optimization: Training for Diversity Improves Test-Time Search
authors: Ryan Bahlous-Boldi, Isha Puri, Idan Shenfeld, Akarsh Kumar, Mehul Damani, Sebastian Risi, Omar Khattab, Zhang-Wei Hong, Pulkit Agrawal
abstract: Language models must now generalize out of the box to novel environments and work inside inference-scaling search procedures, such as AlphaEvolve, that select rollouts with a variety of task-specific reward functions. Unfortunately, the standard paradigm of LLM post-training optimizes a pre-specified scalar reward, often leading current LLMs to produce low-entropy response distributions and thus to struggle at displaying the diversity that inference-time search will require. We propose Vector Policy Optimization (VPO), an RL algorithm that explicitly trains policies to anticipate diverse downstream reward functions and to produce diverse solutions. VPO exploits that rewards are often vector-valued in practice, like per-test-case correctness in code generation or, say, multiple different user personas or reward models. VPO is essentially a drop-in replacement for the GRPO advantage estimator, but it trains the LLM to output a set of solutions where individual solutions specialize to different trade-offs in the vector reward space. Across four tasks, VPO matches or beats the strongest scalar RL baselines on test-time search (e.g. pass@k and best@k), with the gap widening as the search budget grows. For evolutionary search, VPO models unlock problems that GRPO models cannot solve at all. As test-time search becomes more standardized, optimizing for diversity may need to become the default post-training objective.
title_zh: 向量策略优化：多样性训练提升测试时搜索
abstract_zh: 语言模型现在必须具备开箱即用的泛化能力，以适应新型环境，并能在类似AlphaEvolve的推理缩放搜索程序中运行——这些程序会利用多种任务特定的奖励函数来选择展开结果。然而，LLM后训练的标准范式往往针对预先指定的标量奖励进行优化，这常导致现有LLM生成低熵响应分布，难以展现推理时搜索所需的多样性。为此，我们提出向量策略优化（VPO），一种显式训练策略以应对多样化下游奖励函数并生成多样化解决方案的强化学习算法。VPO利用了实践中奖励常表现为向量值的特性（例如代码生成中每个测试用例的正确性，或多种不同的用户画像与奖励模型）。本质上，VPO可作为GRPO优势估计器的即插即用替代方案，但它在训练LLM输出一组解集时，使得各单独解能适应向量奖励空间中的不同权衡。在四项任务中，VPO在测试时搜索（如pass@k和best@k）上达到或超越了最强标量RL基线，且随搜索预算增加，优势差距进一步扩大。在进化搜索中，VPO模型解决了GRPO模型完全无法处理的问题。随着测试时搜索日益标准化，优化多样性或将需要成为默认的后训练目标。

title: Sibyl-AutoResearch: Autonomous Research Needs Self-Evolving Trial-and-Error Harnesses, Not Paper Generators
authors: Chengcheng Wang, Qinhua Xie, Wei He, Jianyuan Guo, Shiqi Wang, Chang Xu
abstract: Autonomous research systems increasingly make the scientific workflow executable: agents can propose ideas, run code, inspect results, and draft papers. But executable workflows do not by themselves produce research judgment. We analyze where current systems lose trial experience: weak evidence becomes prose, pilot signals become broad claims, memory remains textual, and recurring process failures do not change later behavior. We introduce Sibyl-AutoResearch, a self-evolving AutoResearch framework built around Scientific Trial-and-Error Harnesses. A harness lets agents run bounded trials, preserve positive and negative outcomes, and route lessons into later planning, validation, claim scope, scheduling, critique, writing, and harness repair. We formalize this through two auditable conversion units: trial-to-behavior conversion, which links trial signals to later research actions, and trial-to-harness-behavior conversion, which links recurring process failures to system updates. We implement the framework in SIBYL, a file-backed autonomous research system that exposes the state, roles, memory, gates, and artifact traces needed to inspect these conversion paths. A retrospective audit identifies eight high-confidence conversion events, with a median latency of one iteration and a maximum latency of three iterations. A recovered-failure registry further shows how five naturally occurring failure classes, including duplicate results, stale numbers, and unsupported statistics, were blocked, downgraded, or routed into later repair. These traces do not establish a comparative performance claim; they show that the proposed conversion units are recoverable from realistic autonomous-research workspaces. The SIBYL framework and system are available at https://github.com/Sibyl-Research-Team/AutoResearch-SibylSystem.
title_zh: Sibyl-AutoResearch：自主研究需要自我演进的试错机制，而非论文生成器。
abstract_zh: 自主研究系统日益使科学工作流可执行：智能体能够提出想法、运行代码、检查结果并起草论文。然而，可执行工作流本身并不产生研究判断。我们分析了当前系统在哪些环节丧失了试验经验：薄弱证据变成论述，初步信号变成笼统主张，记忆仍停留在文本层面，而重复的过程失败未能改变后续行为。为此，我们引入了Sibyl-AutoResearch——一个围绕科学试错框架构建的、自我进化的自动研究框架。该框架允许智能体执行有限试验，保留正面与负面结果，并将经验教训引导至后续的规划、验证、声明范围、调度、评审、写作及框架修复中。我们通过两个可审计的转换单元将其形式化：试验到行为转换，将试验信号关联到后续研究行动；试验到框架行为转换，将重复的过程失败关联到系统更新。我们在SIBYL中实现了该框架——一个基于文件的自主研究系统，暴露了审视这些转换路径所需的状态、角色、记忆、门控和工件痕迹。回顾性审计识别出八个高置信度的转换事件，其中位延迟为一次迭代，最大延迟为三次迭代。恢复失败注册表进一步展示了五种自然发生的失败类别（包括重复结果、过时数据和不支持的统计数据）是如何被阻止、降级或引导至后续修复的。这些痕迹并不构成比较性能声明，而是表明所提出的转换单元可以从真实的自主研究工作空间中恢复出来。SIBYL框架及系统可在https://github.com/Sibyl-Research-Team/AutoResearch-SibylSystem获取。

title: Hypergraph as Language
authors: Mengqi Lei, Guohuan Xie, Shihui Ying, Shaoyi Du, Jun-Hai Yong, Siqi Li, Yue Gao
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently shown strong potential in modeling relational structures. However, existing approaches remain fundamentally graph-centric: they focus on processing pairwise graph structures into tokens that LLMs can understand. In contrast, many real-world relational patterns do not naturally conform to the pairwise-edge assumption, and are better modeled as high-order associations in hypergraphs. For hypergraph structures, existing methods often fail to preserve the native semantics that multiple objects are jointly connected by the same high-order relation, limiting their ability to exploit complex structures. To address this limitation, we put forth the "Hypergraph as Language" perspective and propose Hyper-Align, a hypergraph-native alignment framework for large language models. Hyper-Align compiles the query-object-centered hypergraph context into hypergraph tokens directly consumable by a base LLM. Specifically, we introduce Hypergraph Incidence Detail Template with Overview (HIDT-O), which serializes high-order association structures into a fixed-shape hybrid template combining local incidence details and overview-level summaries. We then design a Hypergraph Incidence Projector (HIP), which maps native high-order incidence structures into the LLM token space through explicit semantic-structural decoupling and bidirectional message passing between vertices and hyperedges. We further define a concrete Hypergraph-as-Language input protocol, which jointly feeds hypergraph tokens and textual prompts into a frozen base LLM, supporting both vertex-level and hyperedge-level tasks under a unified question-answering paradigm. To systematically evaluate different methods in hypergraph structural modeling, we introduce HyperAlign-Bench. Extensive experiments show that Hyper-Align significantly outperforms existing methods across in-domain and zero-shot evaluations.
title_zh: 超图作为语言
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLMs）近年来在关系结构建模方面展现出强大潜力。然而，现有方法本质上仍以图为中心：它们专注于将成对图结构处理成LLM可理解的标记。相比之下，许多现实世界的关系模式并不天然符合成对边的假设，更适合建模为超图中的高阶关联。针对超图结构，现有方法往往无法保留多个对象通过同一高阶关系联合连接的原始语义，限制了其利用复杂结构的能力。为解决这一局限，我们提出“超图即语言”视角，并推出Hyper-Align，一种面向大语言模型的超图原生对齐框架。Hyper-Align将查询对象中心的超图上下文编译为可直接供基础LLM使用的超图标记。具体而言，我们引入带概述的超图关联细节模板（HIDT-O），它将高阶关联结构序列化为固定形状的混合模板，结合了局部关联细节和全局级摘要。接着，我们设计超图关联投影器（HIP），通过显式语义-结构解耦以及顶点与超边间的双向消息传递，将原生高阶关联结构映射到LLM标记空间。我们还定义了一个具体的“超图即语言”输入协议，将超图标记和文本提示联合输入到冻结的基础LLM中，在统一的问答范式下支持顶点级和超边级任务。为系统评估不同方法在超图结构建模中的表现，我们引入了HyperAlign-Bench。大量实验表明，Hyper-Align在领域内和零样本评估中显著优于现有方法。

title: HarnessAPI: A Skill-First Framework for Unified Streaming APIs and MCP Tools
authors: Edwin Jose
abstract: Every Python function deployed as an LLM tool must today exist in two forms: an HTTP endpoint for human-facing clients and CI pipelines, and an MCP tool registration for agent runtimes such as Claude and Cursor. These representations share business logic yet diverge in all the surrounding machinery (routing, validation, serialisation, streaming, and schema maintenance), and they drift apart as the underlying code evolves. We present HarnessAPI, a Python framework that eliminates this duplication by treating a typed skill folder as the single source of truth. From one handler.py plus Pydantic schemas, the framework automatically derives a streaming HTTP endpoint with Server-Sent Events, an interactive OpenAPI/Swagger UI, and a zero-configuration MCP tool, all served from a single process. Dual-mode content negotiation lets the same handler serve SSE-streaming and JSON-returning clients with no handler changes. A dynamic code-generation mechanism ensures Pydantic type annotations propagate correctly to FastMCP's inspection layer, resolving a technical limitation that prevents naive closure-based registration. Measured across six representative skills using cloc, HarnessAPI reduces framework-facing boilerplate by 74% compared with a manually maintained dual-stack implementation (FastAPI server + FastMCP server). HarnessAPI subclasses FastAPI, inheriting its full middleware, dependency-injection, and deployment ecosystem. It is available at https://github.com/edwinjosechittilappilly/harnessapi and on PyPI (pip install harnessapi)
title_zh: HarnessAPI：一种技能优先的统一流式API和MCP工具框架
abstract_zh: 每个作为LLM工具部署的Python函数，目前都必须以两种形式存在：一个面向人类客户端和CI管道的HTTP端点，以及一个面向Claude、Cursor等智能体运行时的MCP工具注册。这两种表示共享业务逻辑，但在所有周边机制（路由、验证、序列化、流式传输和模式维护）上存在分歧，并且随着底层代码的演进而逐渐偏离。我们提出HarnessAPI，这是一个Python框架，通过将类型化的技能文件夹视为唯一真实来源，消除了这种重复。从一个handler.py加上Pydantic模式，该框架自动派生出带服务器发送事件的流式HTTP端点、交互式OpenAPI/Swagger UI以及零配置的MCP工具，全部由一个进程提供服务。双模式内容协商允许同一处理程序无需修改即可服务SSE流式和返回JSON的客户端。一种动态代码生成机制确保Pydantic类型注释正确传播到FastMCP的检查层，解决了阻止基于闭包的朴素注册的技术限制。使用cloc对六个代表性技能进行测量，与手动维护的双栈实现（FastAPI服务器 + FastMCP服务器）相比，HarnessAPI将面向框架的样板代码减少了74%。HarnessAPI继承自FastAPI，继承了其完整的中间件、依赖注入和部署生态系统。它可在https://github.com/edwinjosechittilappilly/harnessapi 和PyPI（pip install harnessapi）上获取。

title: SWE-Mutation: Can LLMs Generate Reliable Test Suites in Software Engineering?
authors: Yuxuan Sun, Yuze Zhao, Yufeng Wang, Yao Du, Zhiyuan Ma, Jinbo Wang, Mengdi Zhang, Kai Zhang, Zhenya Huang
abstract: Evaluating software engineering capabilities has become a core component of modern large language models (LLMs); however, the key bottleneck hindering further scaling lies not in the scarcity of high-quality solutions, but in the lack of high-quality test suites. Test suites are indispensable both for synthesizing program repair trajectories and for providing precise feedback signals in reinforcement learning. Unfortunately, due to the high cost and difficulty of annotation, high-quality test suites have long been hard to obtain, while those automatically generated by LLMs tend to be superficial and lack sufficient discriminative power. As a first step toward constructing high-quality test suites, we introduce SWE-Mutation, a benchmark for evaluating LLM-generated test suites. The benchmark characterizes test suites by introducing systematically mutated solutions that attempt to ``fool'' the test suites and pass validation. We further propose an agentic, language-agnostic framework for automatically generating complex mutants. Our benchmark consists of 2,636 mutated variants derived from 800 original instances and includes a multilingual subset spanning nine programming languages. Experiments on seven LLMs reveal that even DeepSeek-V3.1 achieves only 10.20% verification and 36.15% detection rates, highlighting the inadequacy of current LLMs. Additionally, our agentic mutation strategy enhances realism, reducing average detection rates from 71.04% to 39.81% compared to conventional methods. These findings expose persistent deficiencies in the ability of current LLMs to generate reliable and discriminative test suites.
title_zh: SWE-Mutation：大语言模型能否在软件工程中生成可靠的测试套件？
abstract_zh: 评估软件工程能力已成为现代大型语言模型（LLMs）的核心组成部分；然而，阻碍进一步扩展的关键瓶颈并不在于高质量解决方案的稀缺，而在于高质量测试套件的缺乏。测试套件对于综合程序修复轨迹以及在强化学习中提供精确的反馈信号都是不可或缺的。遗憾的是，由于标注成本高且难度大，长期以来一直难以获得高质量的测试套件，而由LLMs自动生成的测试套件往往流于表面，缺乏足够的区分能力。作为构建高质量测试套件的第一步，我们引入了SWE-Mutation，这是一个用于评估LLM生成测试套件的基准。该基准通过引入系统性的突变解决方案，试图“欺骗”测试套件并通过验证，从而刻画测试套件的特性。我们进一步提出了一个基于智能体的、与语言无关的框架，用于自动生成复杂的突变体。我们的基准包含从800个原始实例衍生出的2,636个突变变体，并涵盖了一个跨越九种编程语言的多语言子集。在七个LLM上的实验表明，即便是DeepSeek-V3.1也仅达到10.20%的验证率和36.15%的检测率，突显了当前LLM的不足。此外，我们的智能体突变策略增强了真实性，与传统方法相比，平均检测率从71.04%降至39.81%。这些发现揭示了当前LLM在生成可靠且具有区分度的测试套件能力方面存在的持续缺陷。

title: Automated Repair of TEE Partitioning Issues via DSL-Guided and LLM-Assisted Patching
authors: Chengyan Ma, Jieke Shi, Ruidong Han, Ye Liu, Feng Li, Yuqing Niu, David Lo
abstract: Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) provide hardware-based isolation to protect sensitive data and computations from potentially compromised operating systems (OS). However, TEE applications inevitably interact with the untrusted OS through SDK interfaces, and improper partitioning can introduce severe vulnerabilities such as data leakage and code injection. While prior work has proposed static analysis tools to detect such issues, automated repair remains largely unexplored. This problem is particularly challenging due to three TEE-specific factors: the lack of standardized secure development guidelines, the difficulty of extracting semantic information from low-level C code, and the absence of mature testing and validation methods. In this work, we present TEERepair, a framework for automatically repairing bad partitioning issues in TEE applications. Our approach tackles the above challenges by introducing a domain-specific language (DSL) to encode repair rules that express and capture common TEE security patterns, which are instantiated as patch templates with placeholders for context-specific variables. We then leverage large language models (LLMs) to reason about code semantics and synthesize context-aware patches, and further generate test clients to validate the repairs. We evaluate TEERepair on the TEE Partitioning Errors Benchmark (PartitioningE-Bench), achieving a significantly higher repair success rate of 87.6% compared to baselines. Furthermore, applying TEERepair to real-world TEE projects, we submitted 5 repair pull requests, 2 of which have been confirmed and merged by project maintainers.
title_zh: DSL引导和LLM辅助的TEE分区问题自动修复
abstract_zh: 可信执行环境（TEE）通过基于硬件的隔离机制，保护敏感数据和计算免受可能被攻陷的操作系统（OS）的影响。然而，TEE应用不可避免地通过SDK接口与不可信操作系统交互，不当的分区可能引入严重漏洞，如数据泄露和代码注入。尽管已有研究提出了检测此类问题的静态分析工具，但自动修复仍是一个未被充分探索的领域。由于TEE特有的三个因素，这一问题尤为棘手：缺乏标准化的安全开发指南、从底层C代码中提取语义信息的难度较大，以及缺少成熟的测试与验证方法。本文提出TEERepair框架，用于自动修复TEE应用中的不良分区问题。我们的方法通过引入领域特定语言（DSL）来编码修复规则，以表达和捕获常见的TEE安全模式，这些规则被实例化为带有上下文特定变量占位符的补丁模板。随后，我们利用大语言模型（LLM）推理代码语义并合成上下文感知的补丁，同时生成测试客户端以验证修复效果。我们在TEE分区错误基准测试集（PartitioningE-Bench）上评估了TEERepair，其修复成功率显著高于基线方法，达到87.6%。此外，将TEERepair应用于真实TEE项目后，我们提交了5个修复拉取请求，其中2个已得到项目维护者的确认和合并。

title: Finding Missing Input Validation in TEEs via LLM-Assisted Symbolic Execution
authors: Chengyan Ma, Jieke Shi, Ruidong Han, Ye Liu, Yuqing Niu, David Lo
abstract: Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) provide hardware-enforced isolation that protects sensitive code and data from untrusted software. Despite their strong security guarantees, analyzing TEE applications remains challenging due to the high cost and complexity of configuring complete TEE build and runtime environments, as well as the limited observability imposed by hardware isolation. This paper presents SymTEE, a novel large language model (LLM)-assisted symbolic execution framework for detecting missing input validation issues in TEE applications without requiring real TEE setups. SymTEE begins by leveraging Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) analysis to extract TEE code slices that may lack sufficient input validation, and then employs an LLM (GPT-5 in our case) to automatically convert the extracted slices into KLEE-compatible harness programs containing lightweight mock execution environments for symbolic analysis. Evaluations on 26 vulnerabilities (11 real-world and 15 synthetic) show that SymTEE achieves 100% precision and 92.3% recall in detecting missing input validation vulnerabilities while incurring an average analysis cost of only $0.05. These results demonstrate the effectiveness and practicality of SymTEE's pioneering paradigm of LLM-assisted symbolic execution, where LLMs autonomously generate mock environments to enable automated security analysis without complex setup, providing a more accessible and scalable framework for trusted computing systems.
title_zh: 通过大语言模型辅助的符号执行发现可信执行环境中的缺失输入验证
abstract_zh: 可信执行环境（TEE）通过硬件强制隔离，保护敏感代码和数据免受不可信软件的侵害。尽管具有强大的安全保证，但由于配置完整的TEE构建和运行环境的高昂成本和复杂性，以及硬件隔离带来的有限可观测性，分析TEE应用仍然具有挑战性。本文提出SymTEE，一种新颖的基于大语言模型（LLM）辅助的符号执行框架，用于检测TEE应用中的缺失输入验证问题，无需真实的TEE环境。SymTEE首先利用抽象语法树（AST）分析提取可能缺乏充分输入验证的TEE代码片段，然后使用LLM（本文中为GPT-5）自动将提取的片段转换为兼容KLEE的测试用具程序，其中包含用于符号分析的轻量级模拟执行环境。对26个漏洞（11个真实漏洞和15个合成漏洞）的评估表明，SymTEE在检测缺失输入验证漏洞方面实现了100%的精确率和92.3%的召回率，同时平均分析成本仅为0.05美元。这些结果证明了SymTEE开创性的LLM辅助符号执行范式的有效性和实用性，其中LLM自主生成模拟环境，实现无需复杂配置的自动化安全分析，为可信计算系统提供了更易用且可扩展的框架。

title: The Neural Compiler: Program-to-Network Translation for Hybrid Scientific Machine Learning
authors: Lucas Sheneman
abstract: Scientific machine learning often requires combining known physics with unknown parameters or correction terms learned from data. Existing approaches either ignore known structure, encode it as a soft penalty, or require hand-written PyTorch code for each equation. We present The Neural Compiler, a system that translates programs written in a first-order Scheme-like expression language into frozen, differentiable PyTorch modules. These modules match the source program to floating-point precision and provide gradients through autograd. In hybrid models, the compiled module encodes known physics exactly while learned components model the unknown remainder. We evaluate the compiler across six experiment domains: Feynman physics equations, Lotka-Volterra dynamics, a damped pendulum, a one-dimensional heat equation, three-dimensional vector mechanics, and compositional generalization. Compiled modules match hand-coded PyTorch implementations numerically for single equations, showing no accuracy loss from compilation. With only 1 to 4 trainable parameters, compiled models recover physical constants to less than 1 percent error in most cases, while standard PINN baselines with more than 8500 parameters show 7 to 93 percent error. Compiled modules also compose with zero error, while neural approximations can accumulate large errors in deep composition chains. The main value of the compiler is not improved accuracy over hand-coded equations, but systematic composability: it generates correct, differentiable modules from symbolic specifications without rewriting each equation by hand. The system supports 51 primitive operations, including vector and matrix algebra, enabling PDE discretizations and hybrid scientific models. This string-in, module-out interface also provides a natural target for large language models that translate scientific descriptions into executable differentiable modules.
title_zh: 神经编译器：混合科学机器学习中的程序到网络转换
abstract_zh: 科学机器学习通常需要将已知的物理规律与从数据中学习到的未知参数或修正项相结合。现有方法要么忽略已知结构，将其编码为软惩罚项，要么需要为每个方程手工编写PyTorch代码。我们提出了神经编译器（The Neural Compiler）——一个将用一阶类Scheme表达式语言编写的程序转化为冻结的、可微分的PyTorch模块的系统。这些模块与源代码匹配到浮点精度，并通过自动求导提供梯度。在混合模型中，编译后的模块精确编码已知物理规律，而学习组件则模拟未知的残差部分。我们在六个实验领域评估了该编译器：费曼物理方程、洛特卡-沃尔特拉动力学、阻尼摆、一维热方程、三维矢量力学以及组合泛化。对于单个方程，编译后的模块在数值上与手工编写的PyTorch实现一致，表明编译过程没有精度损失。仅使用1到4个可训练参数，编译模型在大多数情况下能将物理常数的误差恢复至1%以下，而标准物理信息神经网络（PINN）基线使用超过8500个参数，误差却高达7%到93%。编译后的模块在组合时误差为零，而神经近似在深层组合链中可能累积较大误差。该编译器的主要价值不在于相比手工编写方程提高精度，而在于系统性可组合性：它能够从符号规范中生成正确且可微分的模块，无需为每个方程手动重写。系统支持51种基本操作，包括向量和矩阵代数，从而支持偏微分方程离散化和混合科学模型。这种“字符串输入、模块输出”的接口也为大语言模型提供了自然的目标，使其能够将科学描述转化为可执行的微分模块。

title: VeriScale: Adversarial Test-Suite Scaling for Verifiable Code Generation
authors: Yifan Bai, Xiaoyang Liu, Zihao Mou, Guihong Wang, Jian Yu, Shuhan Xie, Yantao Li, Yangyu Zhang, Jingwei Liang, Tao Luo
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed for software engineering, constructing high-quality benchmarks is crucial for evaluating not just the functional correctness, but also the formal verifiability of generated code. However, existing benchmarks are limited by the quantity and quality of positive and negative test cases, leading to an overestimation of model capabilities in generating specifications and implementations. To address this, we propose VeriScale, a novel framework driven by the adversarial implementations. It consists of two stages: test-suite expansion to construct diverse and challenging test cases, and test-suite reduction to distill them into compact yet discriminative suites. While VeriScale is general, we instantiate it on Verina to construct VerinaPlus, which expands the original test suites by over 83$\times$, and VerinaLite, a lightweight 14$\times$ variant. Our experiments across eight state-of-the-art LLMs demonstrate that VerinaPlus exposes substantial model weaknesses hidden by the original benchmark, evidenced by sharp score drops on both SpecGen and CodeGen tasks, whereas VerinaLite maintains this discriminative power at a fraction of the evaluation cost. The enhanced benchmarks and source code are publicly available at https://github.com/XiaoyangLiu-sjtu/VeriScale.
title_zh: VeriScale：面向可验证代码生成的对抗性测试套件扩展
abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）在软件工程领域的应用日益广泛，构建高质量的基准测试不仅对于评估生成代码的功能正确性至关重要，也同样关键于评估其形式化可验证性。然而，现有基准受限于正负测试用例的数量与质量，导致模型在生成规范与实现方面的能力被高估。为解决这一问题，我们提出了VeriScale——一种由对抗性实现驱动的新型框架。该框架包含两个阶段：测试套件扩展（构建多样且具挑战性的测试用例）和测试套件精简（将测试用例提炼为紧凑但具有辨别力的套件）。尽管VeriScale具有通用性，我们将其实例化于Verina，构建了VerinaPlus（原始测试套件扩展超83倍）和轻量级变体VerinaLite（扩展14倍）。我们在八款最先进的大型语言模型上的实验表明，VerinaPlus揭示了原始基准所掩盖的模型显著弱点——在SpecGen和CodeGen任务上得分大幅下降，而VerinaLite则以极低的评估成本保持了这种辨别力。增强后的基准与源代码已开源发布于https://github.com/XiaoyangLiu-sjtu/VeriScale。

title: MOSS: Self-Evolution through Source-Level Rewriting in Autonomous Agent Systems
authors: Qianshu Cai, Yonggang Zhang, Xianzhang Jia, Wei Xue, Jun Song, Xinmei Tian, Yike Guo
abstract: Autonomous agentic systems are largely static after deployment: they do not learn from user interactions, and recurring failures persist until the next human-driven update ships a fix. Self-evolving agents have emerged in response, but all confine evolution to text-mutable artifacts -- skill files, prompt configurations, memory schemas, workflow graphs -- and leave the agent harness untouched. Since routing, hook ordering, state invariants, and dispatch live in code rather than in any text artifact, an entire class of structural failure is physically unreachable from the text layer. We argue that source-level adaptation is a fundamentally more general medium: it is Turing-complete, a strict superset of every text-mutable scope, takes effect deterministically rather than through base-model compliance, and does not erode under long-context drift. We present MOSS, a system that performs self-rewriting at the source level on production agentic substrates. Each evolution is anchored to an automatically curated batch of production-failure evidence and proceeds through a deterministic multi-stage pipeline; code modification is delegated to a pluggable external coding-agent CLI while MOSS retains stage ordering and verdicts. Candidates are verified by replaying the batch against the candidate image in ephemeral trial workers, then promoted via user-consent-gated, in-place container swap with health-probe-gated rollback. On OpenClaw, MOSS lifts a four-task mean grader score from 0.25 to 0.61 in a single cycle without human intervention.
title_zh: MOSS：自主智能体系统中通过源代码级重写的自我进化
abstract_zh: 自主代理系统在部署后大多是静态的：它们无法从用户交互中学习，反复出现的故障会持续存在，直到下一次由人类驱动的更新发布修复。自进化代理应运而生，但所有进化都局限于文本可变的工件——技能文件、提示配置、记忆模式、工作流图——而代理的“驾驭层”则未被触及。由于路由、钩子排序、状态不变量和调度存在于代码中而非任何文本工件中，文本层实际上无法触及整个结构故障类别。我们认为，源代码级适配是一种根本性的更通用媒介：它是图灵完备的，是每个文本可变范围的真超集，其效果是通过确定性方式而非基础模型遵从性来实现，并且不会因长上下文漂移而退化。我们提出了MOSS，一个在源代码层面对生产级代理基础架构进行自我重写的系统。每次进化都锚定于自动策划的一批生产故障证据，并通过确定性的多阶段流水线进行；代码修改委托给可插拔的外部编码代理CLI，而MOSS保留阶段排序和裁决结果。候选方案通过在对临时试验工作器中的候选镜像重放该批次数据来验证，然后通过用户同意控制、原位容器交换以及健康探针控制的回滚机制进行升级。在OpenClaw上，MOSS仅在一个周期内就将四个任务的平均评分从0.25提升至0.61，且无需人工干预。

title: Two is better than one: A Collapse-free Multi-Reward RLIF Training Framework
authors: Shourov Joarder, Diganta Sikdar, Ahsan Habib Akash, Binod Bhattarai, Prashnna Gyawali
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has substantially improved the reasoning ability of LLMs, but often depends on external supervision from human annotations or gold-standard solutions. Reinforcement learning from internal feedback (RLIF) has recently emerged as a scalable unsupervised alternative, using signals extracted from the model itself. However, existing RLIF methods typically rely on a single internal reward, which can lead to reward hacking, entropy collapse, and degraded reasoning structure. We propose a multi-reward RLIF framework that decomposes the training signal into two complementary components: an answer-level reward based on cluster voting and a completion-level reward based on token-wise self-certainty. To combine these signals robustly, we apply GDPO-based normalization to reduce reward-scale imbalance. We further introduce KL-Cov regularization, which targets low-entropy token distributions responsible for disproportionate entropy reduction, preserving exploration and preventing late-stage collapse. Across mathematical reasoning and code-generation benchmarks, our method improves stability and robustness over prior unsupervised RL approaches, while achieving performance close to supervised RLVR methods. These results show that complementary internal rewards, combined with targeted regularization, can support stable long-horizon reasoning without relying on external ground-truth supervision. Code will be released soon.
title_zh: 两个比一个好：一种无崩塌的多奖励RLIF训练框架
abstract_zh: 带可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）显著提升了大型语言模型的推理能力，但通常依赖来自人工标注或标准答案的外部监督。基于内部反馈的强化学习（RLIF）近期作为一种可扩展的无监督替代方案出现，利用从模型自身提取的信号。然而，现有RLIF方法通常依赖单一的内部奖励，这可能导致奖励破解、熵崩溃以及推理结构退化。我们提出一种多奖励RLIF框架，将训练信号分解为两个互补组成部分：基于聚类投票的答案级奖励，以及基于词元级自确信度的完成级奖励。为稳健地组合这些信号，我们应用基于GDPO的归一化来减少奖励尺度不平衡。我们进一步引入KL-Cov正则化，针对导致不成比例熵降低的低熵词元分布，以保持探索并防止后期崩溃。在数学推理和代码生成基准测试中，我们的方法相比先前的无监督RL方法提升了稳定性和鲁棒性，同时达到了接近有监督RLVR方法的性能。这些结果表明，互补的内部奖励结合针对性的正则化，能够在无需依赖外部真实标注监督的情况下支持稳定的长时序推理。代码即将开源。

title: Echo: Learning from Experience Data via User-Driven Refinement
authors: Hande Dong, Xiaoyun Liang, Jiarui Yu, Jiayi Lin, Changqing Ai, Feng Liu, Wenjun Zhang, Rongbi Wei, Chaofan Zhu, Linjie Che, Feng Wu, Xin Shen, Dexu Kong, Xiaotian Wang, Qiuyuan Chen, Bingxu An, Yueting Lei, Qiang Lin
abstract: Static "human data" faces inherent limitations: it is expensive to scale and bounded by the knowledge of its creators. Continuous learning from "experience data" - interactions between agents and their environments - promises to transcend these barriers. Today, the widespread deployment of AI agents grants us low-cost access to massive streams of such real-world experience. However, raw interaction logs are inherently noisy, filled with trial-and-error and low information density, rendering them inefficient for direct model training. We introduce Echo, a generalized framework designed to operationalize the transition from raw experience to learnable knowledge, effectively "echoing" environmental feedback back into the training loop for model optimization. In today's agent ecosystem, user refinement serves as a primary source of such feedback: driven by responsibility for the outcome, users rigorously transform flawed agent proposals into verified solutions. These user-driven refinement sequences inherently distill agents' crude attempts into high-quality training signals. Echo systematically harvests these signals to continuously align the agent with real-world needs. Large-scale validation in a production code completion environment confirms that Echo effectively harnesses this pipeline, breaking the static performance ceiling by increasing the acceptance rate from 25.7% to 35.7%.
title_zh: Echo：通过用户驱动的优化从经验数据中学习
abstract_zh: 静态的“人类数据”存在固有局限性：扩展成本高昂，且受限于创造者的知识水平。而从“经验数据”——即智能体与其环境之间的交互——中进行持续学习，则有望突破这些障碍。如今，AI智能体的广泛部署使得我们能够以低成本获取海量的真实世界经验流。然而，原始交互日志必然充满噪声，充斥着试错过程且信息密度较低，直接用于模型训练效率低下。我们提出了Echo，一个通用框架，旨在将原始经验转化为可学习知识，有效将环境反馈“回响”到训练循环中以优化模型。在当前的智能体生态系统中，用户优化是这类反馈的主要来源：出于对结果负责的驱动力，用户会将智能体有缺陷的提案严格转化为经过验证的解决方案。这些用户驱动的优化序列天然地将智能体的粗糙尝试提炼为高质量的训练信号。Echo系统性地采集这些信号，以使智能体持续与现实需求对齐。在代码补全生产环境中的大规模验证表明，Echo能够有效利用这一流程，将接受率从25.7%提升至35.7%，从而打破了静态性能的天花板。

title: Why Are Agentic Pull Requests Merged or Rejected? An Empirical Study
authors: Sien Reeve O. Peralta, Fumika Hoshi, Hironori Washizaki, Naoyasu Ubayashi, Inase Kondo, Yoshiki Higo, Hiroki Mukai, Norihiro Yoshida, Kazuki Kusama, Hidetake Tanaka, Youmei Fan
abstract: AI coding agents increasingly submit pull requests (Agentic-PRs) to open-source repositories, yet their performance is commonly assessed using merge and rejection outcomes alone. We hypothesized that these outcome labels do not reliably reflect agent capability without considering review interactions. To test this, we conducted a decision-oriented analysis of 11,048 closed Agentic Pull Requests, refined to 9,799 human-reviewed PRs, and manually inspected 717 representative cases to recover decision rationale from interaction artifacts. We found that rejection outcomes substantially overstate agent error: only 35.7% of rejected PRs reflected clear agentic failures, while 31.2% were driven by workflow constraints and 33.1% lacked observable decision rationale. Among merged PRs, 15.4% required explicit reviewer involvement through feedback or direct commits, and 5.5% showed no visible interaction trace. We further observed systematic differences across agents, with Copilot and Devin more often embedded in reviewer-mediated workflows, while Codex and Cursor PRs were typically merged with minimal interaction. These results reject the assumption that PR outcomes alone capture agent performance and demonstrate the need for interaction-aware evaluation grounded in review behavior.
title_zh: 为何代理式拉取请求会被合并或拒绝？一项实证研究
abstract_zh: AI编码智能体越来越多地向开源仓库提交拉取请求（Agentic-PRs），然而其性能通常仅通过合并和拒绝结果来评估。我们假设这些结果标签并未可靠反映智能体能力，除非考虑审查交互。为验证这一点，我们对11048个已关闭的Agentic拉取请求进行了决策导向分析，筛选出9799个人工审查的PR，并手动检查了717个代表性案例，以从交互痕迹中恢复决策依据。结果发现，拒绝结果严重夸大了智能体错误：仅有35.7%的被拒PR反映了明确的智能体失败，而31.2%由工作流约束导致，33.1%缺乏可观察的决策依据。在已合并的PR中，15.4%需要通过反馈或直接提交获得审查者的明确介入，5.5%则未显示任何可见的交互痕迹。我们还观察到智能体间的系统性差异：Copilot和Devin更常嵌入审查者中介的工作流中，而Codex和Cursor的PR通常以最少交互被合并。这些结果否定了仅凭PR结果即可捕捉智能体性能的假设，并表明需要基于审查行为建立交互感知的评估方法。

title: Ratchet: A Minimal Hygiene Recipe for Self-Evolving LLM Agents
authors: Xing Zhang, Yanwei Cui, Guanghui Wang, Ziyuan Li, Wei Qiu, Bing Zhu, Peiyang He
abstract: Self-evolving skill libraries, pioneered by Voyager, let frozen LLM agents accumulate reusable knowledge without weight updates, yet recent evaluation shows that LLM-authored skills deliver $+0.0$pp over no-skill baselines while human-curated ones deliver $+16.2$pp: the bottleneck is not skill authoring but lifecycle management. We introduce \textbf{Ratchet}, a single-agent loop in which a frozen LLM writes, retrieves, curates, and retires its own natural-language skills. Ratchet integrates four candidate hygiene mechanisms: outcome-driven retirement, a bounded active-cap, meta-skill authoring guidance, and pattern canonicalisation. On MBPP+ hard-100 with Claude Opus 4.7, Ratchet lifts held-out pass@1 from a $0.258 \pm 0.047$ baseline to a late-window rolling mean of $0.584$ (peak $0.658 \pm 0.042$) across 100 rounds and 3 seeds, a $+0.328 \pm 0.018$ rolling-mean gain where the no-skill control drifts at $+0.002 \pm 0.005$; the same recipe transfers to an agentic solver on SWE-bench Verified ($+0.22$ peak lift over 20 rounds). Eight ablations (A1--A8) reveal that the minimal working recipe is smaller than our design suggests: retirement and the meta-skill authoring prior are load-bearing, while explicit deduplication (canonicalisation, cover-guard) is subsumed by the meta-skill itself. A non-divergence proposition shows that bounded cap and retirement threshold together prevent expected performance from drifting below the no-skills floor.
title_zh: Ratchet：一种用于自我进化的LLM代理的最小卫生方案
abstract_zh: 由Voyager开创的自进化技能库，使得冻结的LLM代理无需权重更新即可积累可复用的知识，然而近期评估显示，LLM创作的技能相比无技能基线提升0.0个百分点，而人工策划的技能提升16.2个百分点：瓶颈不在于技能创作，而在于生命周期管理。我们介绍\textbf{Ratchet}，这是一个单代理循环，其中冻结的LLM编写、检索、策划和淘汰自己的自然语言技能。Ratchet整合了四种候选卫生机制：结果驱动的淘汰、有界活跃容量、元技能创作指导和模式规范化。在MBPP+ hard-100上使用Claude Opus 4.7，Ratchet将保留的pass@1从$0.258 \pm 0.047$的基线提升到$0.584$的后期窗口滚动均值（峰值$0.658 \pm 0.042$），跨越100轮和3个种子，滚动均值增益为$+0.328 \pm 0.018$，而无技能对照组漂移为$+0.002 \pm 0.005$；相同的方案迁移到SWE-bench Verified上的代理求解器（20轮内峰值提升$+0.22$）。八项消融实验（A1--A8）表明，最小可行方案比我们的设计所暗示的要小：淘汰和元技能创作先验是支撑性的，而显式去重（规范化、覆盖防护）被元技能本身所包含。一个非发散命题表明，有界容量和淘汰阈值共同防止期望性能漂移到无技能基础之下。

title: Parser-Free Querying of Security Logs
authors: Evan Luo, Julien Piet, David Wagner
abstract: Security analysts routinely query system logs to detect threats and investigate incidents, but each log source uses its own semi-structured format: logs are cheap to produce, but expensive to use. The standard approach, building per-source parsers to normalize logs into structured schemas, is powerful but requires continuous engineering effort for each new format. Querying raw logs directly with tools like grep avoids this cost, but requires analysts to know each source's message variants and cannot express the multi-line temporal queries that security investigations demand. We present Sieve, a system that generates executable query code from natural-language security questions by grounding a large language model with lightweight, automatically extracted log-format context, requiring only one LLM call per query followed by deterministic execution. Evaluating 133 security queries across 5 log types, we find that Sieve achieves over a 3x reduction in error rate on complex temporal and cross-event queries compared to manual analyst scripting, with the largest gains on the multi-line correlation tasks most critical to active investigations. Our results and benchmark provide evidence that LLM-generated code can bridge the gap between the expressiveness of structured log querying and the immediacy of working directly with raw files.
title_zh: 无解析器查询安全日志
abstract_zh: 安全分析师通常通过查询系统日志来检测威胁并调查事件，但每种日志源都采用自己的半结构化格式：日志的生产成本低廉，但使用成本高昂。标准的做法是为每种日志源构建解析器，将日志归一化为结构化模式——这种方法虽然强大，但每次遇到新格式都需要持续的工程投入。直接使用grep等工具查询原始日志可以避免这种成本，但要求分析师了解每种日志源的消息变体，并且无法表达安全调查所需的多行时序查询。我们提出了Siebe系统，该系统通过利用轻量级、自动提取的日志格式上下文来指导大语言模型，从而从自然语言的安全问题生成可执行的查询代码——每个查询只需调用一次大语言模型，然后执行确定性操作。在5种日志类型的133个安全查询评估中，我们发现与手动分析师脚本相比，Siebe在复杂时序和跨事件查询上的错误率降低了超过3倍，其中对活跃调查至关重要的多行关联任务提升最为显著。我们的结果和基准测试表明，大语言模型生成的代码能够弥合结构化日志查询的表达能力与直接处理原始文件的即时性之间的差距。

title: Agentic metasurface design with self-correcting language-model systems
authors: Bei Wu, Bo Xiong, Haiyao Luo, Yaqi Li, Li Zhang, Qiaolu Chen, Hongsheng Chen, Yihao Yang
abstract: Automated metasurface design is increasingly important, and recent advances in language-model systems are opening a route toward agentic optical design. Yet modern metasurface applications, from metalenses and holography to optical computing, require long design chains spanning modeling, simulation, coding, optimization and evaluation. These chains are error-prone, whereas existing language-model-based metasurface tools remain largely limited to simple objectives, predefined pipelines or language-to-layout generation. Here we introduce MetaDesigner, a self-correcting language-model system for agentic metasurface design. From a natural-language optical objective, MetaDesigner plans the design route, retrieves domain knowledge, invokes simulation and optimization tools, generates missing tool code and identifies errors through a dedicated Verifier. We demonstrate three tasks of increasing complexity: an RGB metalens with three independent focal spots, a six-plane full-color hologram with an average structural similarity index measure (SSIM) of 0.97, and an optoelectronic hybrid neural network for image style transfer. These tasks require 74, 136 and 90 reasoning steps, respectively, and the system self-corrects errors in frequency mapping, numerical aperture estimation, network-parameter counting and loss-function description. These results establish MetaDesigner as a self-correcting route to agentic metasurface design, where language-model systems can not only execute optical design tasks but also extend, inspect and repair the design process itself.
title_zh: 利用自纠正语言模型系统的能动式超表面设计
abstract_zh: 自动化超表面设计日益重要，而语言模型系统的最新进展正为自主光学设计开辟新路径。然而，从超透镜、全息术到光学计算等现代超表面应用，需要涵盖建模、仿真、编码、优化和评估的漫长设计链。这些链条容易出错，而现有基于语言模型的超表面工具大多局限于简单目标、预定义流程或语言到布局的生成。本文介绍MetaDesigner，一种用于自主超表面设计的自校正语言模型系统。根据自然语言描述的光学目标，MetaDesigner规划设计路线、检索领域知识、调用仿真与优化工具、生成缺失的工具代码，并通过专门的验证器识别错误。我们展示了三个复杂度递增的任务：一个具有三个独立焦点的RGB超透镜、一个平均结构相似性指数（SSIM）为0.97的六平面全彩全息图，以及一个用于图像风格迁移的光电混合神经网络。这些任务分别需要74、136和90个推理步骤，系统在频率映射、数值孔径估算、网络参数计数和损失函数描述中实现了错误自校正。这些结果确立了MetaDesigner作为自主超表面设计自校正路径的地位——语言模型系统不仅能执行光学设计任务，还能扩展、检查和修复设计过程本身。

title: Evolutionary Multi-Task Optimization for LLM-Guided Program Discovery
authors: Halil Alperen Gozeten, Xuechen Zhang, Emrullah Ildiz, Ege Onur Taga, Tara Javidi, Samet Oymak
abstract: Recent LLM-guided evolutionary search methods have shown that iterative program mutation can discover strong algorithms, but they typically optimize each task independently, even when related tasks share reusable structure. We introduce Evolutionary Multi-Task Optimization (EMO) for LLM-guided program discovery, and propose EMO-STA (Shared-Then-Adapt), a two-stage framework that first evolves a shared archive of executable programs across a task family and then adapts selected shared candidates to each target task. Within EMO-STA, we explore multiple adaptation strategies, including warm-starting from the shared archive, adapting the best average shared program, and adapting the shared program that performs best on each target task. Across eight task families spanning continuous optimization, geometric construction, modeling, and algorithmic optimization, EMO-STA improves over matched-compute single-task evolution in most settings, with STA Best-Local providing the strongest in-distribution adaptation and STA Best-Shared yielding robust transfer to unseen tasks. Compute-allocation experiments show that allocating a substantial fraction of the family-level budget to shared evolution is consistently beneficial, with roughly balanced shared and adaptation budgets often being optimal. Beyond compute efficiency, we show that shared evolution can mitigate overfitting in low-evidence settings (e.g. few training data), including ARC tasks and time-series feature engineering, by favoring programs that generalize across all tasks rather than exploiting task-specific brittle artifacts.
title_zh: 面向LLM引导的程序发现的进化多任务优化
abstract_zh: 近期，基于大语言模型（LLM）引导的进化搜索方法表明，迭代式程序突变能够发现强大的算法，但这类方法通常独立优化每个任务，即使相关任务共享可复用的结构。我们提出了面向LLM引导程序发现的进化式多任务优化（EMO），并设计了EMO-STA（共享-然后-适应）两阶段框架：该框架首先在任务家族中进化出一个可执行程序的共享存档，随后将选定的共享候选程序适应至各目标任务。在EMO-STA框架内，我们探索了多种适应策略，包括：从共享存档进行热启动、适应平均表现最佳的共享程序，以及适应在各目标任务上表现最优的共享程序。在涵盖连续优化、几何构造、建模及算法优化的八个任务家族中，EMO-STA在多数场景下均优于同等计算量的单任务进化方法。其中，STA Best-Local策略在分布内适应上表现最强，而STA Best-Shared策略则能稳健地将知识迁移至未见任务。计算资源分配实验表明，将家族级预算的相当大比例分配给共享进化能带来持续收益，而共享与适应预算的均衡分配往往达到最优。除计算效率外，我们证明共享进化能在低证据场景（如训练数据稀缺）中缓解过拟合问题——通过偏好能泛化至所有任务而非依赖任务特定脆弱伪影的程序，包括ARC任务及时间序列特征工程等案例。

title: From Patches to Trajectories: Privileged Process Supervision for Software-Engineering Agents
authors: Murong Ma, Tianyu Chen, Yun Lin, Shuai Lu, Qinglin Zhu, Yeyun Gong, Zhiyong Huang, Peng Cheng, Yan Lu, Jin Song Dong
abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on long teacher trajectories is the dominant way to instill investigation and reasoning in open software-engineering (SWE) agents. Since every retained response becomes an imitation target, the student inherits the final outcome and intermediate flaws, including ungrounded leaps and redundant loops. High-quality training data must be effective(each step is grounded and narrows the agent's epistemic gap to the correct fix) and efficient(each step is information-bearing rather than redundant or looping). Existing recipes filter or relabel teacher rollouts using only a binary terminal verifier, which does not directly target these axes and provides no supervision on instances where the teacher fails. Most real issue includes a developer-authored reference patch, $p^\star$, revealing the file paths, runtime behaviors, and coding conventions presupposed by the correct fix, yet standard pipelines discard it. We propose Patches-to-Trajectories (P2T), which uses $p^\star$ as privileged information during curation and formulates trajectory construction as bi-objective optimization over per-step effectiveness and trajectory length. A reverse phase distills $p^\star$ into a latent process graph, $G^\star$, of contextual facts and solution milestones. A forward phase curates trajectories from blinded teacher continuations by scoring per-step progress against $G^\star$ under a leakage-blocking groundedness check and retaining the shortest effective segments. Using only 1.8k curated SWE-Gym instances, P2T improves effectiveness and efficiency over outcome-filtered SFT and its tool-error-masking variant. On SWE-bench Verified, it raises Pass@1 by up to 10.8 points while reducing per-instance inference cost by ~15%, with consistent gains on SWE-bench Lite. Size-matched ablations and qualitative analysis further isolate trajectory quality from data scale.
title_zh: 从补丁到轨迹：面向软件工程智能体的特权过程监督
abstract_zh: 对长教师轨迹进行监督微调（SFT）是目前在开源软件工程（SWE）智能体中灌输探究与推理能力的主流方式。由于每个保留的响应都会成为模仿目标，学生智能体不仅继承了最终结果，还继承了中间步骤的缺陷，包括缺乏依据的跳跃和冗余循环。高质量的训练数据必须同时具备有效性（每一步都有依据，并能缩小智能体与正确修复方案之间的认知差距）和高效性（每一步都承载信息，而非冗余或循环）。现有方法仅使用二元终端验证器对教师生成的轨迹进行过滤或重新标记，该验证器不直接针对上述两个维度，也无法在教师失败的情况下提供任何监督。实际上，大多数真实问题都包含开发者编写的参考补丁 \(p^\star\)，它揭示了正确修复方案所预设的文件路径、运行时行为及编码惯例，但标准流程却丢弃了这一信息。我们提出了一种名为“补丁到轨迹”（P2T）的方法，该方法在数据整理过程中将 \(p^\star\) 作为特权信息加以利用，并将轨迹构建形式化为关于每一步有效性和轨迹长度的双目标优化。一个反向阶段将 \(p^\star\) 提炼为一个潜在过程图 \(G^\star\)，其中包含上下文事实与解决方案里程碑。一个前向阶段则通过以下方式从盲化的教师连续生成中整理轨迹：根据 \(G^\star\) 对每一步的进展进行评分，同时通过防止信息泄露的可靠性检查，并保留最短的有效片段。仅使用 1.8k 个经过整理的 SWE-Gym 实例，P2T 在有效性和高效性上均优于基于结果过滤的 SFT 及其工具错误掩码变体。在 SWE-bench Verified 上，它将 Pass@1 提升了最多 10.8 个百分点，同时将每个实例的推理成本降低了约 15%，并在 SWE-bench Lite 上取得了一致的改进。规模匹配的消融实验和定性分析进一步将轨迹质量与数据规模分离开来。

title: PITMuS: A Tool for Automated Bug Dataset Generation via Source-Level Mutant Reconstruction
authors: Tasfia Tasnim, Soneya Binta Hossain
abstract: LLM-based software engineering increasingly depends on executable, context-rich bug artifacts: paired correct and buggy code, methods under test (MUTs), documentation, and metadata. These artifacts support the training and evaluation of automated bug localization and repair techniques, testing and test oracle generation methods, and documentation-driven automation. Although curated benchmarks (e.g., Defects4J) remain valuable, they are static and increasingly vulnerable to contamination as code models are trained on large public corpora. A complementary strategy is to generate fresh, cutoff-aware datasets by selecting real system versions and injecting controlled bugs at the source level. Mutation testing is a natural basis for this strategy: it applies predefined mutation operators to programs and records whether the existing test suite detects each injected change. PIT is a state-of-the-practice mutation testing tool for Java that performs mutation at the bytecode level. This design makes mutation testing fast and practical, but PITMuS reports mutants primarily through XML, making them difficult to inspect, replay, or reuse as structured source-level dataset records. To address this gap, we present PITMuS, which combines PITMuS XML metadata with debug information from compiled Java class files to localize and reconstruct the source edit corresponding to each mutant. PITMuS then automatically produces structured datasets containing source-level buggy and fixed code pairs, documentation context, and metadata for downstream training and evaluation. Although we evaluate PITMuS on eight open-source Java systems, it can be applied to any Java system where PITMuS can be integrated.
title_zh: PITMuS：一种通过源代码级变异重构实现自动化缺陷数据集生成的工具
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型的软件工程日益依赖于可执行、富含上下文信息的缺陷产物：配对的正误代码、被测方法、文档和元数据。这些产物支持自动化缺陷定位与修复技术、测试与测试预言生成方法，以及文档驱动的自动化流程的训练与评估。尽管精心策划的基准测试集（如Defects4J）仍有价值，但它们静态不变，且随着代码模型在大型公开语料库上训练而日益面临污染风险。一种互补策略是通过选取真实系统版本并在源代码级别注入可控缺陷，生成全新的、具有截止时间感知的数据集。变异测试正是该策略的自然基础：它向程序应用预定义的变异算子，并记录现有测试套件是否检测到每个注入的变化。PIT是Java领域一款实用级变异测试工具，它在字节码层面执行变异，使得变异测试快速而实用。然而，PITMutants主要通过XML报告变异体，导致其难以检查、重放或作为结构化的源代码级数据集记录重用。为填补这一空白，我们提出了PITMuS，它结合了PITMutants的XML元数据与编译后Java类文件的调试信息，以定位并重构每个变异体对应的源码编辑。随后，PITMuS自动生成结构化的数据集，其中包含源代码级的缺陷与修复代码对、文档上下文及元数据，用于下游训练与评估。尽管我们在八个开源Java系统上评估了PITMuS，但它可应用于任何能够集成PITMutants的Java系统。

title: Self-Policy Distillation via Capability-Selective Subspace Projection
authors: Guangya Hao, Yitong Shang, Yunbo Long, Zhuokai Zhao, Hanxue Liang
abstract: Self-distillation bootstraps large language models (LLMs) by training on their own generations. However, existing methods either rely on external signals to curate self-generated outputs (e.g., correctness filtering, execution feedback, and reward search), which are costly and unavailable for the best-performing frontier models, or skip curation entirely and train on all raw outputs, an approach that is often domain-specific and hard to generalize. Both also share a deeper weakness that self-generated outputs entangle task-relevant capability with others, such as stylistic patterns, formatting artifacts, and model-specific errors, diluting the signal for the specific capability one aims to improve. In this paper, we propose Self-Policy Distillation (SPD), which achieves generalizable, capability selective without any external signal. Specifically, SPD extracts a low-rank capability subspace from the model's own gradients on correctness-defining tokens, projects key-value (KV) activations into this subspace during self-generation, and fine-tunes on the resulting raw outputs with standard next-token prediction loss. Through extensive experiments across code generation, mathematical reasoning, and multiple-choice QA, we show that SPD achieves up to 13% improvement over state-of-the-art self-distillation methods without external signals and up to 16% improvement over pre-trained baselines. Notably, SPD demonstrates superior generalizability, achieving 15% better performance under out-of-domain generalization settings.
title_zh: 通过能力选择性子空间投影的自策略蒸馏
abstract_zh: 自蒸馏通过让大型语言模型（LLMs）在其自身生成的输出上进行训练来提升模型性能。然而，现有方法要么依赖外部信号来筛选自生成输出（例如正确性过滤、执行反馈和奖励搜索），这些方法成本高昂且不适用于性能最优的前沿模型；要么完全跳过筛选，直接在所有原始输出上进行训练，这种方法往往具有领域特异性且难以泛化。此外，两者还存在一个共同深层缺陷：自生成输出会将任务相关能力与其他因素（如风格模式、格式伪影和模型特有错误）纠缠在一起，从而削弱了旨在提升特定能力的信号。在本文中，我们提出了自策略蒸馏（Self-Policy Distillation, SPD），该方法无需任何外部信号即可实现可泛化且具有能力选择性的训练。具体而言，SPD从模型在定义正确性的词元上的梯度中提取出一个低秩能力子空间，在自生成过程中将键值（KV）激活投射到该子空间中，并使用标准的下一个词元预测损失对生成的原始输出进行微调。通过在代码生成、数学推理和多项选择问答等领域的广泛实验，我们证明SPD相比于无需外部信号的最先进自蒸馏方法最多可提升13%的性能，相比预训练基线最多可提升16%。值得注意的是，SPD展现出卓越的泛化能力，在跨领域泛化设置下实现了15%的性能提升。

title: Therm-FM: Foundation Model is ALL YOU NEED for 3D-ICs Thermal Simulation
authors: Zhen Huang, Haiyang Xin, Wenkai Yang, Yangbo Wei, Zhiping Yu, Yu Zhang, Wei W. Xing, Ting-Jung Lin, Lei He
abstract: Data-driven thermal predictors for 3D-ICs are often trained from scratch for each chip design using many high-fidelity finite-element simulations, leading to high data-generation cost and costly cross-design reuse. We propose Therm-FM, a neural operator framework that adapts a pretrained partial differential equation (PDE) foundation model to steady-state and transient 3D-IC thermal simulation. The motivation is that steady-state and transient chip-level heat conduction respectively share elliptic and parabolic operator structures with diffusion-type PDEs, allowing pretrained diffusion priors to provide an effective initialization for thermal-field prediction under heterogeneous materials, dense TSV/microbump interconnects, and package-level boundary conditions. To further reduce data-generation cost, Therm-FM incorporates a thermal-equivalent multi-fidelity training strategy that uses low-cost approximate simulations for thermal-domain adaptation and limited high-fidelity samples for calibration. Experiments on public HotSpot benchmarks and industrial 3D-IC package benchmarks show that Therm-FM achieves up to a 10.6x reduction in mean error and surpasses prior best accuracy with less than 20% of the training data. In cross-chip adaptation, it matches or surpasses full-data baselines in several metrics using only 10--30 target samples. We release datasets, source code, and pretrained models at https://github.com/haiyangxin/Therm-FM.
title_zh: Therm-FM: 基础模型是三维集成电路热仿真的全部所需
abstract_zh: 数据驱动的三维集成电路（3D-IC）热预测模型通常针对每个芯片设计从零开始训练，使用大量高保真有限元仿真，导致高数据生成成本和昂贵的跨设计复用。我们提出Therm-FM，这是一种神经算子框架，将预训练的偏微分方程（PDE）基础模型适配到稳态和瞬态3D-IC热仿真中。其动机在于，稳态和瞬态芯片级热传导分别与扩散型PDE的椭圆和抛物线算子结构共享特性，使得预训练的扩散先验能够为异质材料、密集TSV/微凸点互连以及封装级边界条件下的热场预测提供有效初始化。为进一步降低数据生成成本，Therm-FM引入了一种热等效多保真训练策略，该策略利用低成本近似仿真进行热域适配，并使用少量高保真样本进行校准。在公开的HotSpot基准测试和工业3D-IC封装基准测试上的实验表明，Therm-FM将平均误差降低了高达10.6倍，并在仅使用不到20%训练数据的情况下超越了此前的最佳精度。在跨芯片适配中，仅使用10-30个目标样本，Therm-FM在多项指标上即可匹敌或超越全数据基线。我们在https://github.com/haiyangxin/Therm-FM上发布了数据集、源代码和预训练模型。

title: Method for Identifying Changes Between Program Versions
authors: Mariam Arutunian, Hripsime Hovhannisyan, Arthur Malajyan, Karen Avetisyan, Hayk Aslanyan
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Computer Theory and Applications (ICCTA)
abstract: This paper presents a two-stage method for detecting changes between program versions. It combines analysis based on metrics with a code clone detection algorithm. The approach uses control and data dependencies between instructions to match functions on a many-to-many basis. Additionally, it allows detecting changed instructions with high accuracy. The developed method provides reliable comparison of executable files, even in the absence of source code. Experimental evaluation on software projects has demonstrated its effectiveness in analyzing changes and detecting modifications.
title_zh: 识别程序版本间变化的方法
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种两阶段方法，用于检测程序版本间的变化。该方法将基于度量的分析与代码克隆检测算法相结合，利用指令间的控制流和数据依赖关系，实现多对多的函数匹配。此外，它能够高精度地检测出变化的指令。所开发的方法即使在缺少源代码的情况下，也能可靠地比较可执行文件。在软件项目上的实验评估证明了其在分析变化和检测修改方面的有效性。

title: Towards Comprehensive Semi-Formal Verification of AMBA AHB/APB Interconnects: Configuration Coverage, Mutation Testing, and Safety-Aware Design-for-Verification
authors: Reshav Jaswal, Mamta Khosla
publish: 2026 International Conference on Intelligent Processing, Hardware, Electronics, and Radio Systems (CIPHER)
abstract: Verification dominates effort in modern System-on-Chip (SoC) design, particularly for interconnects such as AMBA AHB and APB bridges. These interconnects are widely used but prone to subtle corner-case failures that escape simulation-only verification. This paper presents ConfigVerMet++, a semi-formal verification methodology tailored to AHB–APB interconnects. ConfigVerMet++ integrates configuration-driven coverage analysis, simulation, formal unreachability classification (UNR), counterexample-directed test generation, mutation-based robustness checks, safety-aware assertions, and design-for-verification (DFV) hooks. We apply the methodology to a representative AHB–APB subsystem implemented in SystemVerilog and show progression from baseline simulation-only functional coverage of about 75% to complete coverage closure at 100%. The paper presents detailed results: assertion proofs, UNR classification, counterexample-driven tests, mutation detection.
title_zh: 面向AMBA AHB/APB互连的全面半形式化验证：配置覆盖率、变异测试与安全感知的可测性设计
abstract_zh: 验证在现代系统级芯片（SoC）设计中占主导地位，尤其是对于AMBA AHB和APB桥等互连结构。这些互连结构被广泛使用，但容易出现仅在仿真验证中难以发现的细微边界失效情况。本文提出ConfigVerMet++，一种针对AHB–APB互连结构的半形式化验证方法。ConfigVerMet++集成了配置驱动的覆盖率分析、仿真、形式化不可达分类（UNR）、反例引导的测试生成、基于突变的鲁棒性检查、安全性感知断言以及可验证性设计（DFV）钩子。我们将该方法应用于一个用SystemVerilog实现且具有代表性的AHB–APB子系统，展示了从基线仿真功能覆盖率约75%到完全覆盖率闭合100%的进展。本文提供了详细结果：断言证明、UNR分类、反例驱动测试、突变检测。

title: Investigation of Linearity Performance in p-GaN Gate Enhancement-Mode High Electron Mobility Transistor
authors: Nipun Sharma, Ashish Raman, Pankaj Kumar, Sahil Hamid, Mohit Kumar
publish: 2026 International Conference on Intelligent Processing, Hardware, Electronics, and Radio Systems (CIPHER)
abstract: This work examines the linearity of a p-GaN gate HEMT using TCAD simulation. The p-GaN gate configuration is incorporated to achieve a positive threshold voltage (V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">th</inf>) needed for enhancement mode operation. The device’s I<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">d</inf>-V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">gs</inf> characteristics are first analysed to verify the V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">th</inf>, drain current (I<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">d</inf>) behaviour and transconductance of the device. The device exhibits normally-off behaviour, achieving a positive V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">th</inf> of 1.15 V and a maximum I<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">d</inf> of 4.5 × 10⁻⁴ A/µm. Linearity performance is then analysed using the fundamental linearity parameters. The impact of drain-to-source voltage (V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">ds</inf>) on device linearity is examined by determining these characteristics under various bias conditions. Based on our analysis and results, we discovered that the device exhibited optimal linearity. The research indicates that the proposed p-GaN HEMT exhibits remarkable linearity.
title_zh: p-GaN栅极增强型高电子迁移率晶体管的线性性能研究
abstract_zh: 本研究采用TCAD仿真方法，对p-GaN栅极HEMT的线性度进行了分析。通过在器件中引入p-GaN栅极结构，实现了增强模式运行所需的正阈值电压（V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">th</inf>）。首先分析器件的I<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">d</inf>-V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">gs</inf>特性，以验证阈值电压、漏极电流（I<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">d</inf>）行为及跨导。该器件呈现常关特性，实现了1.15 V的正阈值电压和4.5 × 10⁻⁴ A/µm的最大漏极电流。随后利用基本线性度参数评估线性性能。通过在不同偏置条件下测定这些特性，分析漏源电压（V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">ds</inf>）对器件线性度的影响。基于分析结果，我们发现该器件展现出最优线性度。研究表明，所提出的p-GaN HEMT具有显著的线性度优势。

title: Introducing Optimization Techniques into Formal Verification for Faster Convergence and Reduced Runtime
authors: Adepu Saiteja, Mamta Khosla
publish: 2026 International Conference on Intelligent Processing, Hardware, Electronics, and Radio Systems (CIPHER)
abstract: This paper presents a set of optimization techniques aimed at improving convergence speed and reducing runtime in formal verification. Although formal verification is becoming more common in industrial design flows, its adoption is often hindered by inefficient implementation practices and long proof convergence times. To address these challenges, we first introduce a structured and practical verification methodology that guides engineers through the entire verification flow—from property creation and RTL preparation to error analysis and proof closure. This approach is designed to be systematic, repeatable, and suitable for real-world designs. Building on this methodology, the main contribution of this work is a set of optimization techniques developed to accelerate proof convergence and reduce solver complexity. These techniques include targeted adding constraints, parametrizing the modules and reducing parameter size, black boxing the standard modules that adapt during the verification process. Rather than relying on conventional methods, the proposed approach focuses on limiting unnecessary state-space exploration while maintaining proof completeness. Results from representative design examples show that the proposed techniques significantly improve proof success rates and achieve meaningful reductions in overall verification time. Together, these contributions offer a practical and scalable solution that improves the efficiency, reliability, and industrial usability of formal verification.
title_zh: 将优化技术引入形式化验证以加快收敛速度并减少运行时间
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一组优化技术，旨在提高形式验证中的收敛速度并减少运行时间。尽管形式验证在工业设计流程中日益普及，但低效的实现方式和较长的证明收敛时间常常阻碍其应用。为应对这些挑战，我们首先引入了一种结构化且实用的验证方法论，指导工程师完成从属性创建、RTL准备到错误分析和证明闭合的整个验证流程。该方法设计为系统化、可重复且适用于实际设计。以此方法论为基础，本文的主要贡献是开发了一组用于加速证明收敛并降低求解器复杂度的优化技术。这些技术包括：有针对性地添加约束、对模块进行参数化并减小参数规模、以及黑箱化那些在验证过程中自适应的标准模块。与依赖传统方法不同，所提方法侧重于在保持证明完备性的同时，限制不必要的状态空间探索。代表性设计实例的结果表明，所提技术显著提升了证明成功率，并实现了整体验证时间的有效缩减。综合而言，这些贡献提供了一种实用且可扩展的解决方案，提升了形式验证的效率、可靠性和工业可用性。

title: Efficient RTL to GDSII Layout Implementation and Verification of UART Protocol Using SystemVerilog and OpenLane
authors: Dhanavath Rajesh, Arvind Kumar
publish: 2026 International Conference on Intelligent Processing, Hardware, Electronics, and Radio Systems (CIPHER)
abstract: This paper outlines the entire process of designing an ASIC for a Universal Asynchronous Receiver and Transmitter (UART), from RTL to GDSII layout. Yosys begins by creating a gate-level netlist using Verilog's RTL design. Functional verification is thoroughly examined using SystemVerilog testbenches to ensure that it is accurate at the RTL level. The OpenLane toolchain, which includes the OpenROAD application, is used to automate the process of floorplanning, placement, routing, and timing closure for the physical design. The paper goes into more detail about the most important design problems that were faced and talks about possible ways to make things even better. We show simulation results with waveform outputs from different testing scenarios, as well as backend results that show the physical layout and Quality of Results metrics, to prove that the process works effectively, validating the capabilities of the open-source EDA toolchain for producing production-ready ASIC layouts. The importance of each phase evaluated in the ASIC development life cycle is discussed in the concluding sections, along with potential terminology for relating the measurement of design performance and potential solutions for future work that aims to achieve an order of magnitude higher operating frequencies.
title_zh: 使用SystemVerilog和OpenLane的高效UART协议RTL到GDSII版图实现与验证
abstract_zh: 本文概述了通用异步收发器（UART）专用集成电路从RTL到GDSII布局的完整设计流程。Yosys首先利用Verilog的RTL设计生成门级网表。通过SystemVerilog测试平台对RTL级功能验证进行详尽检查，确保其准确性。采用包含OpenROAD应用的OpenLane工具链，自动完成物理设计中的布局规划、元件放置、布线及时序收敛。本文更详细地探讨了所面临的最重要设计问题，并讨论了可能的改进方案。我们展示了不同测试场景下的仿真结果波形，以及体现物理布局和设计质量指标的后端结果，以验证该流程的有效性，确认开源EDA工具链具备生成可量产ASIC布局的能力。结论部分评估了ASIC开发生命周期中各阶段的重要性，并提出了用于衡量设计性能的潜在术语，以及未来工作中旨在实现数量级更高工作频率的潜在解决方案。

title: Automated Repair of Alloy Specifications in the Era of Large Language Models_supp1-3682711.pdf
authors: Hamid Bagheri
abstract: The growing adoption of declarative software specification languages, coupled with their inherent difficulty in debugging, has underscored the need for effective and automated repair techniques applicable to such languages. Researchers have recently explored various methods to automatically repair declarative software specifications, such as template-based repair, feedback-driven iterative repair, and bounded exhaustive approaches. The latest developments in Large Language Models (LLMs) provide newopportunities for the automatic repair of declarative specifications. In this study, we assess the effectiveness of utilizing different LLMs to repair software specifications written in the Alloy declarative language. Unlike imperative languages, specifications in Alloy are not executed but rather translated into logical formulas and evaluated using backend constraint solvers to identify specification instances and counterexamples to assertions. Our evaluation focuses on LLMs’ ability to improve the correctness and completeness of Alloy declarative specifications through automatic repairs. We analyze the results produced by each LLM and compare them with those of leading automatic Alloy repair methods. Our study revealed that while LLMs fall short in comparison to existing techniques in many cases, they were able to successfully repair bugs that no other technique could address. Our analysis also identified errors in LLM-generated repairs, including constraint-related issues (over-constraint and under-constraint), quantifier logic errors, boolean operator misuse, binary relation mismatches, and syntax structure violations. Additionally, we observed instances of hallucinations in LLM-generated repairs and inconsistencies in their results in certain cases. Our study provides valuable insights for software practitioners, researchers, and tool builders considering LLMs for declarative specification repairs.
title_zh: 大型语言模型时代的Alloy规范自动修复_supp1-3682711.pdf
abstract_zh: 随着声明式软件规范语言的日益普及，以及其固有的调试难度，人们越来越需要针对此类语言的有效且自动化修复技术。研究者们近期探索了多种自动修复声明式软件规范的方法，例如基于模板的修复、反馈驱动的迭代修复和有界穷举方法。大语言模型的最新发展为声明式规范的自动修复提供了新的机遇。在本研究中，我们评估了利用不同大语言模型修复用Alloy声明式语言编写的软件规范的有效性。与命令式语言不同，Alloy规范不通过执行来运行，而是转化为逻辑公式，并借助后端约束求解器进行评估，以识别规范实例和断言的反例。我们的评估聚焦于大语言模型通过自动修复提升Alloy声明式规范正确性和完整性的能力。我们分析了每个大语言模型生成的结果，并将其与领先的Alloy自动修复方法进行了比较。研究发现，尽管大语言模型在许多情况下逊于现有技术，但它们成功修复了其他技术无法解决的错误。我们的分析还识别出大语言模型生成的修复中存在的错误，包括约束相关问题（过约束和欠约束）、量词逻辑错误、布尔运算符误用、二元关系不匹配以及语法结构违规。此外，我们观察到部分情况下大语言模型生成的修复存在幻觉现象和结果不一致的问题。本研究为考虑将大语言模型用于声明式规范修复的软件从业者、研究人员和工具开发者提供了宝贵见解。

title: Transistor-Level Optimization and Performance Analysis of a CMOS Op-Amp-Based Comparator for Biomedical Signals
authors: Mansi Jain, P. P. Bansod, Rajesh Khatri, Disha Sharma, Mohit Kumar
publish: 2026 International Conference on Intelligent Processing, Hardware, Electronics, and Radio Systems (CIPHER)
abstract: In this article, we introduce the design, simulation, and layout implementation of a two-stage CMOS operational amplifier employed as a comparator, using SCL 180 nm technology, targeting low-frequency biomedical applications. The design approach emphasizes transistor-level width and length optimization, aiming for an optimal balance between gain, stability, and power efficiency, keeping simplicity in design structure. The proposed design offers an impressive gain of 100 dB, ensuring proper detection of low-amplitude differential signals, and boasts an exceptional phase margin of 179°, verifying extremely stable operation, irrespective of oscillation and noise effects. Transient analysis verifies proper operation of the proposed comparator design, while a mere measured peak transient power of 1.955 µW verifies its compatibility for implementation in power-restricted biomedical applications. The proposed design has been implemented at the layout level employing standard CMOS layout design principles, verifying DRC and LVS checks, ensuring proper correlation of the layout layout and technology consistency. The results obtained verify the efficacy of our proposed approach, and it proves that our proposed design qualifies as an apt, stable, and energy-efficient candidate for biomedical analog front-end circuits and process for evaluation.
title_zh: 用于生物医学信号的基于CMOS运算放大器的比较器的晶体管级优化与性能分析
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种采用SCL 180纳米工艺、面向低频生物医学应用的两级CMOS运算放大器（用作比较器）的设计、仿真与版图实现。该设计方法侧重于晶体管级的宽度和长度优化，旨在实现增益、稳定性和功率效率之间的最佳平衡，同时保持设计结构的简洁性。所提出的设计具有100 dB的出色增益，确保能可靠检测低幅度差分信号，并拥有179°的优异相位裕度，验证了其极其稳定的运行特性，不受振荡和噪声效应影响。瞬态分析验证了该比较器设计的正常运行，而仅1.955 µW的实测峰值瞬态功耗则证实了其在功率受限生物医学应用中的可部署性。所提设计已采用标准CMOS版图设计原则在版图层面实现，并通过了DRC和LVS检查，确保版图与工艺一致性的正确关联。所获结果验证了我们所提出方法的有效性，并证明该设计是适用于生物医学模拟前端电路及评估流程的合适、稳定且高效节能的候选方案。

title: Low Power Testing: A Study of Power Aware Test Insertion Techniques
authors: Atharva Yawalkar, Vrinda Gupta
publish: 2026 International Conference on Intelligent Processing, Hardware, Electronics, and Radio Systems (CIPHER)
abstract: Research on low-power in semiconductor design has always been fascinating. The chip density has significantly increased as fabrication technology has developed and moved towards smaller nano meter (nm) technologies. Testing them presents an additional constraint for the design for test (DFT) design. DFT adds a 5-20% area overhead in comparison to the chip's core functional circuitry. In digital circuits, testability logic is just as significant as functional logic. Thus, optimizing DFT circuitry can help solve the issue of controlling power consumption in digital circuits. This paper discusses various advances in power-aware DFT insertion methods like unified power format (UPF), based designs, efficient scan mapping, and various tradeoffs between compression ratio, chain length, and test time affecting Power-Performance- Area (PPA) of the integrated circuit.
title_zh: 低功耗测试：功耗感知测试插入技术研究
abstract_zh: 半导体设计中的低功耗研究一直备受关注。随着制造工艺向更小纳米（nm）技术演进，芯片密度显著提升，这给可测试性设计（DFT）带来了新的约束。与芯片核心功能电路相比，DFT会增加5%到20%的面积开销。在数字电路中，可测性逻辑与功能逻辑同等重要，因此优化DFT电路有助于解决数字电路中的功耗控制问题。本文探讨了功耗感知DFT插入方法的多种进展，包括基于统一功耗格式（UPF）的设计、高效扫描映射，以及压缩率、链长度和测试时间之间影响集成电路功耗-性能-面积（PPA）的各种权衡。

title: Design and Simulation of a Pulse-Driven 1-Bit SRAM Cell Using CMOS Technology
authors: Thrishala M, Panwala Fenil Chetankumar
publish: 2026 International Conference on Intelligent Processing, Hardware, Electronics, and Radio Systems (CIPHER)
abstract: This paper presents the design and simulation of a pulse-driven 1-bit SRAM subsystem using Cadence Virtuoso in CMOS technology. The proposed design integrates a ring oscillator-based clock pulse generator, a 6T SRAM cell, and a differential sense amplifier. The narrow clock pulse generated by the oscillator precisely defines the timing window for read and write operations, ensuring that these actions occur only within the intended time frame. This approach minimizes unnecessary switching activity, thereby reducing dynamic power dissipation and improving control accuracy. The read and write circuits are activated by separate pulses derived from the oscillator output, providing better synchronization and noise immunity. The sense amplifier ensures reliable data sensing by amplifying small voltage differences between the bit-lines, enabling high-speed and stable operation. Simulation results validate the functional correctness of the complete subsystem, demonstrating accurate read/write cycles and stable operation even under short pulse widths. The proposed pulse-driven control method enhances the overall timing efficiency of the SRAM cell while maintaining low power consumption. This architecture not only simplifies timing control but also offers scalability for high-speed, energy-efficient memory design. The proposed design methodology provides valuable insight into implementing compact, pulse-based memory architectures and can be further extended to multi-bit SRAM arrays or integrated into larger low-power memory systems suitable for embedded and VLSI applications.
title_zh: 基于CMOS技术的脉冲驱动1位SRAM单元设计与仿真
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了采用 Cadence Virtuoso 在 CMOS 工艺中设计并仿真一种脉冲驱动的 1 位 SRAM 子系统。所提出的设计集成了基于环形振荡器的时钟脉冲发生器、6T SRAM 单元和差分读出放大器。振荡器生成的窄时钟脉冲精确确定了读写操作的时间窗口，确保这些操作仅在预期的时间范围内发生。该方法最大限度地减少了不必要的开关活动，从而降低了动态功耗并提高了控制精度。读写电路由源自振荡器输出的独立脉冲激活，提供了更好的同步性和抗噪能力。读出放大器通过放大位线之间的微小电压差，确保可靠的数据检测，实现高速稳定的操作。仿真结果验证了完整子系统的功能正确性，即使在短脉冲宽度下也展示了准确的读/写周期和稳定运行。所提出的脉冲驱动控制方法增强了 SRAM 单元的整体时序效率，同时保持了低功耗。该架构不仅简化了时序控制，还为高速、节能的存储器设计提供了可扩展性。所提出的设计方法为实现紧凑型脉冲式存储器架构提供了宝贵的见解，并且可以进一步扩展到多位 SRAM 阵列，或集成到适用于嵌入式及 VLSI 应用的更大规模低功耗存储器系统中。

title: Accelerating the Pre-Silicon Functional Verification Value Ramp Using Aspect Oriented Development
authors: Hamilton Carter
abstract: In object-oriented verification methodologies like the Universal Verification Methodology, (UVM), where every checker object is run against the design for every test case-there is a high price to pay for frequent check-ins of new or modified verification code: a single flawed checker can bring down an entire regression causing 1000s of test cases to report false negative failures. These massive false-negative incidents are costly in two ways, first, we lose valuable coverage that could have been gained if the constrained random test cases had not erroneously failed, (typically, coverage is only collected from passing test cases.) Second, new, real bugs-surrounded by 1000s of false failures-may be masked or simply ignored. Therefore, the desire to simulate new verification code against a DUT is tempered by the desire not to ruin the existing verification test bench and its associated regression data. This creates a tug of war that can lead to long smoke tests and code review processes that retard the rate at which verification value can be added. We demonstrate a novel development process with three advantages: 1.It significantly reduces verification coding to regression delivery time allowing new test cases and new checkers to be released into regression rapidly. 2.It guarantees there will be no regression-wide false negative failures as a result of the newly released code. 3.It accelerates the speed at which new engineers can be productively added to a verification project. Our novel methodology leverages a programming paradigm defined in the 1970s, but seldom used: aspect-oriented programming, (AOP). We first review the concepts of AOP demonstrating that these concepts-extending multiple classes to add new or modified layers of functionality to the test bench-can be easily implemented using SystemVerilog and the UVM factory pattern. We then review the object-oriented UVM framework paying particular attention to classes that need to be created or modified to implement a checker for an unverified design feature along with the stimulus necessary to exercise that feature. We outline how to deploy aspect-oriented techniques using the UVM factory pattern to insulate the existing verification test bench from new development while allowing the newly developed code to utilize and benefit from the features of the existing test bench. Then, we discuss how the organization inherent in AOP accelerates the learning curve faced by new engineers entering a verification project. In the paper's final section, we briefly review both the implementation and benefits of the process and discuss other avenues where it can be efficiently deployed.
title_zh: 利用面向方面开发加速前硅功能验证的价值提升
abstract_zh: 在诸如通用验证方法论（UVM）等面向对象的验证方法学中，每个检证器对象都会针对每个测试用例对设计进行验证——因此，频繁提交新的或修改后的验证代码需要付出高昂代价：一个有缺陷的检证器就可能导致整个回归测试崩溃，使数千个测试用例报告假阴性故障。这种大规模假阴性事件在两方面造成损失：首先，我们会损失本应在约束随机测试用例未错误失败时获得的宝贵覆盖率（通常仅从通过的测试用例收集覆盖率）。其次，被数千个假阳性失败包围的真正新缺陷可能被掩盖或直接忽略。因此，在仿真新验证代码与不破坏现有验证测试平台及其关联回归数据之间形成了一种矛盾张力。这种拉锯战可能导致漫长的冒烟测试和代码审查流程，从而延缓验证价值的提升速度。我们展示了一种具有三大优势的新型开发流程：1. 显著缩短从验证编码到回归交付的时间，使新测试用例和新检证器能快速发布到回归测试中；2. 保证新发布代码不会导致回归测试中出现全局性假阴性故障；3. 加快新工程师有效参与验证项目的速度。我们的创新方法利用了上世纪70年代定义但鲜少使用的编程范式：面向切面编程（AOP）。我们首先回顾AOP概念，证明这些概念——通过扩展多个类为测试平台添加新的或修改的功能层——可借助SystemVerilog和UVM工厂模式轻松实现。接着回顾面向对象的UVM框架，重点关注为未验证的设计特性实现检证器以及驱动该特性所需激励时需要创建或修改的类。我们概述如何使用UVM工厂模式部署AOP技术，使现有验证测试平台免受新开发影响，同时允许新开发代码利用并受益于现有测试平台的特性。然后讨论AOP固有的组织方式如何加速新工程师进入验证项目时的学习曲线。在论文最后部分，我们简要回顾该流程的实现与优势，并探讨其他可高效部署此方法的途径。

title: Adaptive Shell Scripting with Quine Programs and Large Language Models
authors: Ali Mohammad Saghiri
publish: 2026 International Conference on Current Research in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science (ICCRAIDS)
abstract: Traditional shell scripts require manual maintenance as environments evolve, consuming a substantial fraction of scripting effort. We present an adaptive shell scripting framework that combines Quine-inspired self-modifying code with Large Language Models (LLMs) to enable autonomous script evolution. Our algorithm separates a stable core from an evolvable payload, and validates candidate updates through a multi-stage safety pipeline including syntactic checks, sandboxed semantic tests, and explicit policy validation. We evaluate the framework using Monte Carlo simulation to model realistic administrator behavior in enterprise environments across a set of representative environmental drift scenarios. The results show a clear reduction in manual intervention and high autonomous success on simple-to-moderate single-script changes, while conservatively rejecting unsafe or non-compliant patches through deterministic safety gates. Prompt-template isolation and observation sanitization are implemented; cryptographic integrity of telemetry (e.g., HMAC-signed logs) is recommended hardening for deployments where log tampering is in scope. We also identify a boundary case: complex multi-artifact reconfigurations (e.g., network changes requiring coordinated updates across multiple scripts) remain outside the current single-script scope, motivating a transactional change-set extension with integration invariants. To the best of our knowledge, prior work does not provide an end-to-end framework combining Quine-inspired self-modification, LLM patch proposal, and enforceable multi-stage safety verification for production shell scripting.
title_zh: 结合奎因程序与大型语言模型的自适应Shell脚本编写
abstract_zh: 传统的shell脚本在环境演变时需要手动维护，这消耗了脚本编写工作中相当大的部分。我们提出了一种自适应shell脚本框架，结合了受Quine启发的自修改代码与大型语言模型（LLM），以实现脚本的自主演化。我们的算法将稳定核心与可演化负载分离，并通过包含语法检查、沙箱化语义测试和显式策略验证的多阶段安全管道来验证候选更新。我们使用蒙特卡洛模拟在代表性环境漂移场景中评估该框架，模拟企业环境中的真实管理员行为。结果表明，手动干预显著减少，对于简单至中等复杂度的单脚本变更，自主成功率较高，同时通过确定性安全门保守地拒绝不安全或不合规的补丁。我们实现了提示模板隔离和观测数据清洁化；对于涉及日志篡改风险的部署，建议采用遥测数据的加密完整性保护（例如HMAC签名日志）。我们还识别出一个边界情况：复杂的多工件重配置（例如需要跨多个脚本协调更新的网络变更）目前仍超出单脚本范围，这推动了对集成不变量的事务性变更集扩展的需求。据我们所知，现有研究尚未提供结合Quine启发的自修改、LLM补丁提议和可执行的多阶段安全验证的生产级shell脚本端到端框架。

title: Design and Implementation of a Area Efficient Logic BIST Architecture for 4-bit ALU using Verilog and Cadence Genus
authors: Akash Kumar Prajapati, Bodile Roshan Mukindrao, Suraj Prajapati, Rohit Singh
publish: 2026 International Conference on Intelligent Processing, Hardware, Electronics, and Radio Systems (CIPHER)
abstract: This paper represents the design and the implementation of area efficient Logic Built-in Self-Test (LBIST) architecture for a 4-bit Arithmetic Logic Unit (ALU) using Verilog and Cadence Genus. To minimize the hardware overhead, the proposed method uses only two small components like a Linear Feedback Shift Register (LFSR) for pseudo-random test pattern generation and a Multiple Input Signature Register (MISR) for output response compression. Testing activation and pattern generation are controlled externally through a simple mode-select signals which eliminates the need for a control FSM and reduces the additional logic block. The LBIST enable ALU was synthesized under area optimization constraints, and the results show that the inclusion of LFSR and MISR introduces only the minimal area overhead while maintaining correct functionality and reliable faulty detection. The final MISR signature effectively distinguish fault free and faulty behavior, demonstrating that an efficient and compact self-test mechanism can be achieved without a BIST controller. This approach is well-suited for small data paths unit, educational testability demonstrations, and the low-power SoCs modules where area is a primary constraints of the blocks.
title_zh: 基于Verilog和Cadence Genus的4位ALU面积高效逻辑内建自测试架构的设计与实现
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种面向4位算术逻辑单元（ALU）的面积高效逻辑内置自测试（LBIST）架构的设计与实现，采用Verilog和Cadence Genus工具。为最小化硬件开销，所提方法仅使用两个小型组件：线性反馈移位寄存器（LFSR）用于伪随机测试生成，以及多输入特征寄存器（MISR）用于输出响应压缩。测试激活与模式生成通过简单的模式选择信号进行外部控制，从而消除了对控制有限状态机（FSM）的需求，并减少了额外的逻辑模块。基于面积优化约束综合了支持LBIST的ALU，结果表明，集成LFSR和MISR仅在保持正确功能与可靠故障检测的同时引入了极小的面积开销。最终MISR特征能有效区分无故障与故障行为，证明无需BIST控制器即可实现高效紧凑的自测试机制。该方法特别适用于小型数据通路单元、教学测试演示以及以面积为关键约束的低功耗片上系统（SoC）模块。
